product_name: Fra-Ber Ko Iron Demir Tozu Sökücü ve Jant Temizleyici - 750 ml

sources.cleaned_content:
# Ko Iron

Decontaminant for ferrous residues and limestone

Ko Iron is a car iron remover that removes iron and mineral residue otherwise difficult to tackle with a normal cleaner. It can be used on different car surfaces including rims, bodywork and windows.

The main features:

- Iron remover: suitable for removing iron left by brake pads, city pollution, rail dust and acid rain.
- Color change: creates a special visual effect that turns purple in the presence of microparticles of iron and rust.
- Gel formula: it comes in a highly concentrated format for better adhesion and performance on vertical surfaces.
- Low odour: the low-sulphur-odour formula is designed to make it easier to work at close range.
- Cherry fragrance: it leaves a pleasant scent after each application.

Product Images:
![image](https://www.fra-ber.it/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/ko-iron-di-fra-ber-819x1024.jpg)

### Directions for use

- Spray the product pure to treat highly contaminated surfaces, or diluted in water in a ratio of 1:1 / 1:2 for lightly contaminated surfaces. For heavy-duty dirt, use a brush or glove. Wait for the product to react and change colour (2-3 minutes), then rinse. Do not apply the product on hot surfaces and do not let it dry.

### Warnings

Do not allow the product to dry and do not apply in the sun and on hot surfaces. On delicate surfaces, a spot test should always be performed before use. Avoid contact between the product and the cast iron brake calliper.

#### Formats and article codes

- Format: 4,54 L - Item Code: 700210 - Box: 4 pcs

#### Download

- Technical data sheet (Italian): https://fraberantegnate-my.sharepoint.com/:b:/g/personal/onedrive_fra-ber_it/EckM_sJ6I6hJk27bX9gKev0B71430Wwd7wZ_UBJ0MfCDoQ?e=gzh46J
- Technical data sheet (English): https://fraberantegnate-my.sharepoint.com/:b:/g/personal/onedrive_fra-ber_it/ERO3aD6NwX1MrXla51bvXfkBU-AglwAAeFPqP5uWernLUw?e=CfESP4

# FRA-BER KO IRON 4.54L

Car iron remover designed to eliminate iron and mineral residues that are challenging to remove with regular cleaners.

- Field of application: various car surfaces such as rims, bodywork and windows.
- Effectively eliminates iron deposits from brake pads, city pollution, rail dust, and acid rain.
- Colour indication: it turns purple when it contacts iron micro-particles and rust.
- Gel formula: highly concentrated for better adhesion and performance on vertical surfaces.
- Low odour: with a low-sulphur-odour formula for easier close-range application.
- Cherry fragrance: leaves a pleasant cherry scent after each use.

SKU: 340261
BARCODE: 8027486807116
4 PCS/BOX

Ko Iron by Fra-Ber is a specialized car iron remover designed to eliminate iron and mineral residues that regular cleaners struggle to remove. It is suitable for use on various car surfaces, including rims, bodywork, and windows.

The product efficiently removes iron deposits from brake pads, city pollution, rail dust, and acid rain. It features a unique colour-changing effect that turns purple when it comes into contact with iron micro-particles and rust, providing a visual indication of its action.

Application tips: For rust, use the product in its pure form. For surfaces contaminated with iron, dilute it to a ratio between 1:1 and 1:2. Do not allow the product to dry and avoid applying it in direct sunlight or on hot surfaces.

Files:
- Safety Data Sheet
- Technical Data Sheet

sources.page_title: FRA-BER KO IRON 750ML Cleaner & Disinfectant For Body & Wheel | Garage Equipment Center | GEC Egypt
sources.cleaned_content:
# FRA-BER KO IRON 750ML Cleaner & Disinfectant For Body & Wheel

### Description:

FRA-BER KO IRON 750ML – Professional Iron & Rust Remover for Bodywork and Wheels
FRA-BER KO IRON is a powerful decontaminant and cleaner designed to remove ferrous residues, brake dust, and mineral deposits from all types of vehicle surfaces — including wheels, rims, and bodywork.
Its acid-free formula makes it completely safe for steel, alloy, chrome, and polished rims, while still offering high cleaning power. During use, the product changes color to purple, indicating it’s actively dissolving iron particles, rust, and embedded contaminants.
Thanks to its low-odor formulation, KO IRON provides a pleasant and safe user experience, ideal for car wash centers, detailing workshops, and professional car care services looking for top-tier results.

#### Key Features:

- Removes iron dust, rust, and mineral residues effectively
- Safe for all types of rims and painted surfaces
- Acid-free and low-odor formula for easy use
- Creates a purple visual effect when reacting with iron particles
- Perfect for professional detailing and deep wheel cleaning

#### Directions for Use:

- Ready-to-use product (750 mL).
- Spray evenly on a cool surface.
- Wait 2–5 minutes until the product reacts and turns purple (do not let it dry).
- Rinse thoroughly with water.
- For stubborn dirt, use a detailing brush.
- For bodywork decontamination, work panel by panel.

#### Warnings:

- Always test on a small hidden area before full application.
- Do not apply on hot surfaces or allow the product to dry.
- Avoid contact with cast iron brake calipers.

Price: 390.00 EGP

Internal Reference: CCCCXX00041

Category: Exterior Chemicals > Tires & Rims

sources.page_title: DIY Detail Iron Remover - 16 oz - Detailed Image
sources.cleaned_content:
# DIY Detail Iron Remover - 16 oz

Price: $19.99

Product Information:
- Remove brake and rail dust from your paint and rims!
- Color changing formula
- Mist, let it dwell, rinse away application
- Product Codes: DIYIR016-CASE, DIYIR0128-CASE

Available Sizes:
- 16 oz - $19.99 ($1.25 / oz)
- 128 oz - $99.99 ($0.78 / oz)

Quantity Discounts: 2+ units at $18.99 (5% off)

### Product Description

The DIY Detail Iron Remover helps dissolve harmful fallout and brake dust fast and easy! Iron deposits can be a huge problem if they embed into the surface and are left to sit, so it is imperative to remove them safely. When you use an Iron Remover, it will cling to the surface instantly loosening up these iron oxide particles for safe and quick removal. Just spray the surface, let the formula dwell, and rinse away. DIY Detail Iron Remover utilizes a color change technology that will show you that the Iron Remover is reacting to the contamination. Agitate with a wash mitt or sponge if the contamination is heavy and rinse away once you are finished. After use, it will leave your paint or wheels cleaner than before and ready for you to polish or apply a layer of protection. Rust deposits, industrial dust, lime deposits, brake dust, and other contaminants are no match for this strong formula. Even though it is strong, it is still pretty gentle as Iron Remover is pH neutral and safe on various surfaces. Safely and easily remove iron deposits with the DIY Detail Iron Remover!

Directions: Spray Iron Remover directly onto a cool surface (wheel or paint) and allow it to dwell for 3-8 minutes. Lightly agitate, if necessary, any ferrous particles will dissolve, forming a purple solution. Do not allow the product to dry on the surface. Rinse the product off the surface.

### From The Label

#### Product Description

Iron Remover is a powerful and effective way to dissolve ferrous oxides from painted surfaces and wheels. Iron remover utilizes color change technology to show you contaminated surfaces.

#### Directions

Spray Iron Remover directly onto a cool surface (wheel or paint) and allow to dwell for 3-8 minutes. Lightly agitate, if necessary, any ferrous particles will dissolve, forming a purple solution. Do not allow the product to dry on the surface. Rinse the product off the surface.

For Best Results: Use in a well-ventilated area out of direct sunlight as the product has a powerful and unpleasant odor.

### Customer Reviews

Reviewed by Raul C. on 4/8/2025 (DI Verified Purchase)
Would they buy this item again? Yes
DIY Detail iron remover has been perfect for decontaminating scratchy paint. Paired with the Perforated Synthetic Decon Towel (clay towel) left the once scratchy paint very smooth. Also used for brake dust on the wheels and it left them free of Brake contamination. I only used about 2 oz for a car that has never been decontaminated. Great ROI. The only con was the odor that comes along with most iron removers. However, the odor of this new formulation is not a strong as the original. This is my choice of iron remover moving forward. Very easy to use and very effective.

Reviewed by Brayden O. on 12/11/2024 (DI Verified Purchase)
Would they buy this item again? Yes
Very effective and can be used as clay lubricant

Reviewed by Kenneth M. on 10/12/2024 (DI Verified Purchase)
Would they buy this item again? Yes
This stuff is fantastic. You know what I love about it..It is not only it's a good iron remover. I use it as I'm claying the vehicle and I use this iron remover as my lubricant.. i've been wanting to do this for years, but none of the iron removers can do something like this, but they engineered this product to do that with lubricants. So if you want to save time and money, this stuff is fantastic. It's off the charts in my books!!

100% of customers said that they would buy this item again (Based upon 3 ratings)

sources.page_title: CarPro IronX | Iron Fallout Remover for Paint & Wheels | PolishedBliss
sources.cleaned_content:
# CarPro IronX Iron Remover

by CarPro

Price: from £3.00

Sizes:
- 50ml - £3.00
- 500ml - £11.00
- 1L - £19.00
- 4L - Sold out

Availability: Only 7 left! (50ml)

## We Say

CarPro IronX is a pH-balanced, acid-free decontaminant, designed specifically to dissolve ferrous iron particles embedded in your car's paint, wheels, and other surfaces. Over time, tiny particles from brake dust and industrial fallout cling to your car, causing rust spots and even clear coat damage. CarPro IronX tackles this with a chemical process that bonds with these iron particles at the molecular level, breaking them down safely without harming the surface.
One of the coolest things about CarPro IronX is the colour change reaction. When the formula comes in contact with iron particles, it turns a deep purple as it starts working, which is both satisfying and helpful – you can actually see it going to work! This reaction is due to an indicator that shows where iron contamination is heaviest, so you know exactly where to focus.
CarPro IronX's formulation is incredibly effective, yet gentle enough not to damage paint, alloy, or other delicate materials. Unlike harsher acids, this solution relies on a controlled pH-neutral chemistry that's safe for use on all surfaces. Simply spray it on, let it dwell for a few minutes (letting that purple reaction happen), and then rinse it off. It's impressive how smooth and clean everything feels afterward – you're literally left with a contaminant-free, polished surface ready for waxing or sealing.
For anyone serious about deep cleaning and maintaining their vehicle, IronX is an absolute must-have. Its chemical process is a true example of smart detailing science, and the results are nothing short of professional.

## Key Features

- Agitation Required: No (See How To Use)
- Dilutable: No (Ready to use)
- Cleaning Strength: 10/10 (Compared To Others)

## Description

The Ultimate Solution for Decontaminating Your Car's Paint and Wheels

When it comes to achieving a truly pristine, contaminant-free finish on your car's paint and wheels, CarPro IronX Iron Remover is the professional-grade solution detailers trust worldwide. Designed to target and dissolve embedded ferrous particles, CarPro IronX goes beyond conventional cleaning, ensuring your vehicle's surface is as smooth, clean, and protected as possible. It's an essential pre-wash step for any car enthusiast or professional detailer looking to maintain a showroom-quality appearance.

What is CarPro IronX Iron Remover?
CarPro IronX is a powerful, pH-balanced iron decontamination spray specially formulated to target iron fallout from your vehicle's paint and wheels. Whether it's brake dust, industrial fallout, or airborne iron particles, these contaminants are not only unsightly but can also compromise the durability of your car's clear coat if left untreated. CarPro IronX's unique formula chemically dissolves these iron deposits safely, transforming contaminants into a water-soluble form that easily rinses away.

1. Exceptional Iron Removal Power: CarPro IronX is formulated to tackle even the most stubborn iron particles on paint, wheels, and other surfaces. It actively bonds to ferrous particles, loosening and dissolving them on contact.
2. pH-Balanced & Safe on All Surfaces: This iron remover is pH-neutral, making it safe for use on clear coats, glass, aluminium, chrome, and more. CarPro IronX will not damage your paint, ensuring a smooth and residue-free finish.
3. Visual Colour Indicator: IronX features a visual purple colour-changing effect, signalling when iron particles are being dissolved. This allows you to see the product working in real-time, ensuring thorough decontamination.
4. Improved Paint & Sealant Longevity: By removing iron contaminants that can penetrate paint layers and cause oxidation, CarPro IronX helps extend the lifespan of waxes, sealants, and coatings applied afterward, ensuring long-lasting protection.
5. Effortless Application: With a simple spray-on, dwell, and rinse-off application process, CarPro IronX saves time while delivering powerful results.

## Specification

| Agitation Required | No |
| Cleaning Strength | 10/10 |
| Dilutable | No |
| Maximum Dwelling Time | 5 |
| Removes Inorganic Contaminants | Yes |
| Removes Organic Contaminants | No |
| Safe For All Wheel Types | Yes |
| Strips Coatings | No |
| Strips Sealants And Waxes | No |
| pH | (7) |

## How To Use

CarPro IronX comes pre-diluted to the correct strength for safe exterior use.

In all cases, wash and rinse the surfaces you are going to treat in the normal way. Next, working on 3-4 panels at a time, spray CarPro IronX on liberally and allow 3-5 minutes for it to work; during this interval the initially transparent solution will gradually turn a deep red as ferrous compounds and sintered iron particles dissolve into solution (this effect can be very pronounced, but don't panic because it's quite normal and to be expected). Although IronX is essentially a touchless cleaner, you can agitate it with a microfibre towel if needs be (we recommend using a PB Disposable Towel). After 3-5 minutes, rinse the surfaces you have treated with a strong stream of water. Note that if the solution has begun to dry you may need to use a stronger jet of water from a pressure washer to remove the residue. After rinsing off, check the treated surfaces for residual contamination by running your fingertips over them while they are still wet. Contaminant-free surfaces should feel perfectly smooth (if your fingertips aren't particularly sensitive you can magnify your sense of touch by putting your fingers inside a cellophane wrapper first). If you can detect any grittiness then it's likely that the treated surfaces are still contaminated with non-ferrous particulates (e.g. paint overspray) and will need to be carefully clayed before any polishing is done or any protection is applied.

# CARPRO Iron X

Brand: Carpro

Regular price: $24.95 CAD
Sale price: $21.21 CAD (Save $3.74)

Sizes:
- 500ml - $21.21 CAD
- 1L - $39.95 CAD
- 4L - $139.95 CAD

3%+ Discount with 3+ of the Same Item

Barcode (500ml): 8809397811051
Barcode (1L): 8809397811068
Barcode (4L): 8809397811075

## Easily removes iron particles
IronX works by creating a water-soluble complex with iron particles lodged in the surface, facilitating their removal through rinsing. This process provides a deeper cleaning compared to washing or claying alone.
The new formula features a reduced odor compared to others on the market.

Safe and pH Neutral
IronX features an advanced pH-balanced (pH-7) formula that safely breaks down ferrous metallic contamination caused by automotive brakes, rail travel, and construction from delicate vehicle surfaces. It can be used on paint, plastic, chrome, glass, and alloy wheels.

Strong and fast decon
Use CARPRO IronX as part of the chemical decontamination process, right before the initial wash. Always work on a cool panel and avoid direct sunlight. On hot days, work in sections and do not allow the product to dry.

It's important to note that IronX does not replace clay bars but complements them. IronX helps remove the majority of contaminants, making the clay bar process safer.

# CarPro IronX Cherry (Low Odor Ver.)

### Highly effective, acid-free and pH balanced (6~7pH) car paint, wheels & glass cleaner

Safe for all wheels including aluminium/Chromes/Anodized and alloys. This formulation is also effective and safe for use on all car surfaces and will not deteriorate clear coats. This preventative measure puts a stop to corrosion, IronX contains unique chemical ingredients that effectively dissolves the sintered iron by forming a water-soluble iron complex. No other method cleans paint and wheels as deeply as IronX.

The IronX Paint and wheels Decontamination System were developed as a method of removing paint contamination beyond what can be removed by washing or claying. If you are familiar with detail clay, you know it is capable of removing above surface contaminants that have bonded to the paint. The IronX is designed to remove what lies below the paint surface as well as above.

Airborne chemical compounds and ferrous particles (particles containing iron) actually penetrate the paint and create corrosive compounds that eat deep into the paint's sub-layers or paint's pin-holes. This is a gradual process that often is not evident until it's too late. Claying does not remove the entire particle which will continue to spread beneath the surface if not dissolved.

During the use of your vehicle, brake dust and road grime become sintered to the surface of the car paint, rims and wheels due to the high temperature conditions they are normally exposed. Brake dust contains high levels of iron and once sintered to the rim, becomes extremely difficult to dissolve or remove without the use of harsh chemicals. IronX opens up the paint's pores to release ferrous particles and to neutralize caustic compounds that have developed in the paint's subsurface. Ongoing damage is immediately stopped and future damage is prevented by removing the ferrous particles.

IronX sprays on as a transparent liquid. As the cleansing liquid begins to work into the dirt and grime, the formula begins to turn purple/red. The purple/red coloration is the IronX Cleaner forming a bond to the sintered iron on the car paint and wheel and changing its state to a water soluble complex for easy removal. Stubborn, baked on grime may take a small amount of agitation. Rinse car paint and wheels thoroughly with a power washer and wipe dry.

The IronX is used by body shops for pre-cleaning prior to detailing and by dealerships for new and used car prep. It is proven to deliver a clean, glassy smooth vehicle that is protected from the harmful effects of paint contamination. No other is as fast and effective at removing multi-layer paint and wheels contamination.

Features:
- Removes Iron Particles and prevents the spread of iron-related damage & helps to protect your vehicle from paint system failure.
- New Formula combines Cherry perfume to aid in masking Iron Dissolving Chemicals
- Safe to use, Acid Free, and pH neutral (pH 6-7).
- Safe to use on Clear Coat Paint
- Safe to use on Aluminum, Chrome, Anodized, Alloy, or Clear coated wheels.
- Safe for use on all solid car surfaces and will not deteriorate clear coats. (Avoid using on Fabric Convertible tops.)

How do iron particles appear on your car surface and where? Iron particles are all around us, and of course on our cars after travelling through the environment. They can be made from your car braking, driving near other cars, big trucks, train rails, industrial zones etc. They adhere to the car surface and once they "stick" to your paint due to their sharp edges together with sunshine they start to bake into the soft car paint layer where they oxidize and rust.

How to prevent iron dust from etching your paint? It's almost impossible to prevent the irons to stick on the surface, but it has been proven that inorganic coatings (such as Cquartz CQUK) that have self-cleaning effects can reduce the quantity of iron that adheres to the surface.

How to remove iron particles from the surface? There are a few options. Clay bar is one of them however claying will remove most of the irons by shaving them, which leaves some underneath the surface where it cannot reach. Also, clay could possibly mar your paint with micro scratches together with the iron it catches. Another option is by oxalic acid solutions. Though it may remove iron you can't be sure it is safe on paint, which depends on dilution (low pH), and it's not safe to use for your own health and environment. The third option is by Iron X, a pH-neutral product, which reacts only with iron particles which it dissolves. IronX contains a specific chemical that reacts aggressively with iron... BUT and it's big but, this chemical is very unstable if not mixed in the right %, its sensitive to heat as well.

Why does it change colour? Iron X changes colour to red/purple when coming in contact with iron particles, this is due to chemical reaction between the chemicals and iron.

Will Iron X stain chrome wheels or chrome trims? No, it's completely safe to use on any chrome wheels, trim, or bare aluminium wheels. There is only one condition: Do not let it dry under sunlight.

Will Iron X discolor wheel weights? Yes, it will. Wheel weights are made from lead, Iron X will change the lead colour to green. However light agitation will recover the original colour.

Will Iron X affect brake callipers? For most high-end callipers it will not affect them however we have heard from customers in the past that Iron X can affect the paint colour of low-quality acrylic painted callipers. For this reason, we advise you to be more careful not to spray on them.

Will Iron X remove wax from car paint? Yes and no, if it's a highly organic oil type it will affect the wax properties. If it's a synthetic polymer sealant it won't affect it much. On Cquartz or other inorganic coatings it won't affect them at all. In fact, it is even recommended for use on them.

Does Iron X remove tar spots as well? No, Iron X reacts only with iron particles.

Is Iron X safe to use on 3M films venture shields? Yes, there is no problem at all using it on clear bra's and others.

Why does it smell bad? This is the nature of the chemical used, you cannot avoid this. If it doesn't smell so strong it means it has very little effect on iron or is a very diluted or inferior formula. We do advise you to use a facemask and latex (or Nitrile) gloves while using Iron X.

Can I leave Iron X to dry on the surface? Yes, you can leave Iron X on the surface to dry, but not under direct sunshine! However, I don't suggest you leave any chemical composition to dry.

Iron Remover or Clay?
Iron removers are not meant to replace clay barring but to complement it. Iron remover will eliminate the majority of iron contaminants, making clay barring safer. A clay bar will not pick up as much contaminants and grit, reducing the risk of scratching the paint.

Great for cracks and crevices
IronX is also excellent for decontaminating hard-to-reach areas, cracks, and crevices. It's a must for removing iron from complex areas such as wheels, rotors, brake calipers, etc.

Where can I spray this on?
You can use CARPRO IronX on all exterior surfaces: PPF, plastics, glass, rubber trims, wheels, aluminum, painted surfaces, and metal surfaces.

Anything I should be aware of?
Always use IronX on cool surfaces. The reason is, you don't want the product to evaporate before it can chemically react with the iron fillings to bleed them off. And you don't want the 'purple' to dry on the surface. It does have a 'funky' smell, but don't worry, it's not toxic.

Difference between IronX Cherry and Lemon Scent?
They share the majority of base chemistry and have equal potency. The only difference is that 'Lemon Scent' has an even less intrusive smell.

Is it safe on PPF, decals and films (matte/gloss)?
Yes, safe on all surfaces. Just don't let it dry on those surfaces.

Product Images:
![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/CARPRO__IronX_500ml.webp?v=1766519998&width=1800)
![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/Carpro_IronX_500.webp?v=1766519998&width=1800)
![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/Carpro_IronX_1l_f835f28c-9178-4f50-9ee8-271b175f2696.webp?v=1766519998&width=1800)
![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/Carpro_IronX_4L_0333d661-3565-44a4-a6a9-7790c17de6a9.webp?v=1766519998&width=1800)
